title: Product Browsing and Search

actors.name: Customer
actors.description: Authenticated user with session usertype='customer'. Session holds username, password, usertype.

use_cases.name: Browse All Products
use_cases.description: Customer visits userHome.jsp or index.jsp with no query params; all products are listed.

use_cases.name: Search Products by Keyword
use_cases.description: Customer submits a keyword; results matched against ptype, pname, pinfo (case-insensitive LIKE). Falls back to all products if empty.
use_cases.primary_method: ProductServiceImpl.searchAllProducts(search) → SELECT * FROM product WHERE lower(ptype) LIKE ? OR lower(pname) LIKE ? OR lower(pinfo) LIKE ?
use_cases.returns: List<ProductBean>; fallback to getAllProducts() if result is empty

use_cases.name: Browse by Category / Type
use_cases.primary_method: ProductServiceImpl.getAllProductsByType(type) → SELECT * FROM product WHERE lower(ptype) LIKE ?
use_cases.returns: List<ProductBean>; fallback to getAllProducts() if empty

use_cases.name: View Product Image
use_cases.description: Each product card in the listing calls ShowImage servlet to render the stored binary image.
use_cases.trigger: GET /ShowImage?pid=<prodId> (called from img src in JSP)
use_cases.primary_method: ShowImage.doGet() → ProductServiceImpl.getImage(prodId) → SELECT image FROM product WHERE pid=?
use_cases.returns: byte[] written to ServletOutputStream; fallback to WebContent/images/noimage.jpg if null

use_cases.name: View Product Details
use_cases.description: Retrieve full details of a single product by ID.
use_cases.trigger: Invoked programmatically or via product detail page

use_cases.name: Send Fan / Contact Message
use_cases.description: Customer submits a contact/fan message (name, email, comments) from index.jsp footer form.
use_cases.returns: JS alert with 'Comments Sent Successfully' or failure message; page re-includes index.jsp via RequestDispatcher

key_classes.name: ProductServiceImpl
key_classes.db_table: product (pid, pname, ptype, pinfo, pprice, pquantity, image)

key_classes.name: ShowImage
key_classes.fallback: Reads WebContent/images/noimage.jpg via ImageIO when image is null

key_relationships: ProductServiceImpl uses ProductBean (creates, returns, populates from DB)

views.session_check: userName and password must be non-null; redirects to login.jsp on failure
features: Add to Cart / Buy Now / Remove from Cart / Checkout buttons

views.role: Public product listing page (also used for guests)
views.session_check: usertype must be 'customer'; isValidUser flag set but product list still rendered for public
features: includes FansMessage contact form in footer

important_notes: Search is case-insensitive and full-text LIKE across ptype, pname, pinfo columns
Empty search/type results automatically fall back to showing all products
Product images are stored as BLOBs in MySQL; served via ShowImage servlet with noimage.jpg fallback
FansMessage sends HTML email to hardcoded address ellison.alumni@gmail.com; requires mailer config in application.properties
Session-based auth: session attributes username, password, usertype (value 'customer')
Product card in JSP shows: image (150px), name, info (truncated 100 chars), price (Rs), Add to Cart / Buy Now buttons
